## Branch Naming Validation

- [ ] Branch follows:
  feature/<feature-name>-<ai>-YYYYMMDD-HHMM

Example:
feature/top-iam-risks-devin-20260425-1700

## Branch Naming
- [ ] Branch follows naming convention:
  feature/<feature-name>-YYYYMMDD-HHMM

Example:
feature/top-iam-risks-20260425-1530


## Feature
What is being built?

## Problem
What problem does this solve?

## Solution
How is it implemented?

## Product Reasoning
Why does this matter for a CISO / IAM Director?

## Screenshots
Attach UI screenshots

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Supports Detect → Prioritize → Fix
- [ ] Works as expected
- [ ] No hardcoded values
- [ ] Handles errors
- [ ] UI reviewed
- [ ] API output validated

## Risk Level
Low / Medium / High

## PM Approval Required
- [ ] Yes
